# Digital ABCs

Digital ABCs is an Australian business based in New South Wales that builds trustworthy AI tools for real-life clarity.

## Primary Product

### Linguistic Decoder

URL: https://digitalabcs.com.au/apps/decoder.html

Linguistic Decoder is an AI-assisted iPhone app for analysing written messages, tone cues, possible intent, communication patterns, confidence notes, and calmer response options.

It is designed for people who want to pause before reacting to a confusing text, email, or written exchange. It helps separate what was said from what may be interpretation, worry, pressure, or missing context.

Current status:

- Available now on iPhone through the Apple App Store.
- Android is not live yet.
- Digital ABCs is seeking volunteer beta testers for the Linguistic Decoder Android release. Volunteers can email info@digitalabcs.com.au.
- Five free analyses are available to start.

Important limits:

- Not medical advice.
- Not mental health advice.
- Not legal advice.
- Not crisis or safety support.
- Not a certainty machine.
- Does not claim to know what another person truly meant.

Privacy and AI handling:

- Messages enter the Digital ABCs framework.
- Detected direct identifiers are redacted where possible.
- Analysis parts are extracted for AI processing.
- Prepared text is sent to a trusted AI provider.
- The AI response returns to the Digital ABCs framework.
- The report is assembled for the user.
- Placeholder details are mapped back into the user-facing report.
- Automated redaction is protective but cannot guarantee every sensitive detail is detected.

## Main Story Hub

The Insights page is intended to become the main Digital ABCs story and content hub. It should be treated as the primary source for founder-led product notes, trustworthy AI thinking, governance explanations, launch lessons, and practical build-in-public context.

## Contact

Email: info@digitalabcs.com.au

Location: Toongabbie, NSW, Australia
